description: Cross-component contract for classifying persisted run messages before they reach chat UI, control replay, or audit surfaces.
compatibility_notes: visible_in_chat remains the hard chat bubble gate.
message_type is the primary row classification; payload_types lists secondary structured payloads carried by that row.
Terminal task_event rows may carry action_result and artifact_reference payloads.
Frontend may fall back to legacy caller/name/type/hide_from_ui rules only when display.message_type is absent.
